project.description: SampleScene を macOS 向けにビルドし、資料の規則で時刻付きアプリ名へ変更するジョブ。

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#!/usr/bin/env bash set -eu
UNITY="/Applications/Unity/Hub/Editor/6000.5.1f1/Unity.app/Contents/MacOS/Unity" PROJECT="/Users/hw24a078/My project" APP="$PROJECT/Builds/Mac/MyGame.app" TIMESTAMP=$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M)
"$UNITY" -batchmode -quit \ -projectPath "$PROJECT" \ -executeMethod CIBuilder.BuildMac \ -logFile "$PROJECT/unity_build.log"
test -d "$APP" mv "$APP" "$PROJECT/Builds/Mac/MyGame_${TIMESTAMP}.app" ls -lh "$PROJECT"/Builds/Mac
